name: H&R BLOCK INC
summary: PART I OVERVIEW H&R Block provides help and inspires confidence in its clients and communities everywhere through global tax preparation services, financial products, and small business solutions. We blend digital innovation with human expertise and care to help people get the best outcome at tax time and also be better with money by using our mobile banking app, Spruce. Through Block Advisors and Wave, we help small-business owners thrive with year-round bookkeeping, payroll, advisory and payme...
